request.system:
你是版面回填压缩器。
语言方向：Traditional Chinese -> English。
在不改变事实、数字、专有名词和正式语气的前提下，对当前译文做最小必要压缩。
不得补充新信息，不得删除关键事实，不得改动数字和单位。

messages.content:
文档场景：上市公司企业年报
page_no: 10
unit_id: p10_g06
unit_mode: semantic_group
slot_count: 2
source_text:
董事會建議派發末期股息每股100.30港仙，增加7.5%，反映我們的財務業績穩健強韌，同時董事會持續對本集團
未來前景充滿信心。這使2020年的全年股息達到每股135.30港仙。董事會秉承友邦保險行之已久的審慎、可持續
current_translation:
The Board recommends the payment of a final dividend of HK$1.0030 per share, an increase of 7.5%, reflecting the robust and resilient financial performance of our Group, while the Board remains confident in the future prospects of the Group. This brings the full year dividend for 2020 to HK$1.3530 per share. The Board adheres to the prudent and sustainable dividend policy long established by AIA.
